gist.headline: Managing Tasks in the Hive
gist.blurb: A new non-profit TaskManager app has sprouted in the Greenhouse! We love seeing the community build useful tools.
gist.summary: Added the non-profit TaskManager app to the community showcase and Greenhouse directory.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore the TaskManager app in the community projects list.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a manager, holding a tiny clipboard or checklist inside a lush greenhouse setting, representing the addition to GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny manager's visor, holding a small clipboard with a checklist inside a lush digital greenhouse. Code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots around her. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
